title: OTP Screen - Verify auto-submission on entering the 4th digit
description: Tests that the OTP is automatically verified without needing to tap a submit button.
preconditions: User is on the OTP screen and has received the correct OTP.

steps.description: 1. Enter the first 3 digits of the correct OTP.
2. Enter the 4th and final digit of the correct OTP.
3. Observe the app's behavior immediately after the 4th digit is entered.

expected_result: The app automatically initiates the OTP verification process, shows a loading indicator, and logs the user in upon success.
